messages.say:
Thought for 1m 9s


Your summary is directionally correct. The only changes I’d make are the “what’s blocking execution” items and the SSOT choices.


What’s true across the 5 docs (the shared contract)


LangGraph is a control-plane state machine, not an enforcement layer: it routes, retries, loops, checkpoints. All enforcement stays in deterministic CLIs (gates, registry writes, merges, scope enforcement).
LangGraph Integration Architect…
Integrated LangGraph Orchestrat…

All inter-tool messaging must be artifact-based: JSON artifacts on disk + hashes in state, not free-text.
LangGraph Integration Architect…
Integrated LangGraph Orchestrat…

0-touch = watcher/trigger + headless orchestrator + fail-closed + evidence sealing as the completion definition.
Integrated LangGraph Orchestrat…

The “complete plan” assumes a ~67-file addition set for the orchestrator + wrappers + schemas + tests + docs.
dreamy-orbiting-koala


The real blocker (must-fix before any implementation)


The Errors doc isn’t “nice to fix”; it contains runtime breakers that prevent the pipeline from running at all:


argparse attribute access (args.out-envelope vs args.out_envelope)

uuid.uuid-4() vs uuid.uuid4()

broken heredoc argument passing in the loop script

Copilot CLI --stream off likely invalid

unverified npm package name for Copilot CLI
Plus design/logic gaps: critic placement, missing backoff, missing auth preflight, missing schemas/examples.
Errors in ChatGPT research


SSOT recommendation (so you don’t get drift between docs)


Treat the documents like this:


SSOT for orchestration contract + run directory + envelope + LIV + routing rules: “Integrated LangGraph Orchestrator for NEWPHASEPLANPROCESS”.
Integrated LangGraph Orchestrat…

SSOT for LangGraph positioning rules (control-plane vs execution-plane, artifact message bus): “LangGraph Integration Architecture”.
LangGraph Integration Architect…

Defect ledger / stop-ship list: “Errors in ChatGPT research”.
Errors in ChatGPT research

Implementation packing list (files/dirs/tests/docs) and wiring to NPP CLI: the “Complete Implementation Plan” doc.
dreamy-orbiting-koala


Corrections to your “Key Takeaways”


“Requires fixing 4 critical Python bugs” → it’s more than 4 if you include the loop script + CLI flag/package verification + missing schemas/examples + missing auth/backoff.
Errors in ChatGPT research

Don’t hardcode “18 gates” vs “19 gates” anywhere in the LangGraph layer. The orchestrator should call “run-gates” (or gate topology lookup) and treat the gate list as data to avoid doc mismatch drift.
LangGraph Integration Architect…
dreamy-orbiting-koala


The minimal “do-this-next” sequence


Apply every confirmed runtime fix (argparse attrs, uuid4, heredoc, copilot flags, package verification).
Errors in ChatGPT research

Add the missing schemas + minimal example inputs so the loop can run end-to-end without “implied” input shape.
Errors in ChatGPT research
dreamy-orbiting-koala

Fix the loop topology so Critic runs after refinement iterations (Gate → Critic → Refiner → Gate …), and add bounded backoff/ratelimit handling + auth preflight.
Errors in ChatGPT research
LangGraph Integration Architect…

Implement the phase-spine LangGraph graph (Validate → Hash/LIV → Preflight → Worktrees → Dispatch → Collect → Gates(+heal loop) → Merge → Invariants → Seal → Summary) using only tool adapters.
Integrated LangGraph Orchestrat…

Wire 0-touch trigger (folder drop or commit enqueue) and add 3 integration tests: golden success, fail+heal, fail+escalate.
Integrated LangGraph Orchestrat…
